rulings.Case Title: CHARLES PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 9, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Intervenors¿ (on behalf of Scott Co. of California) motion for summary judgment: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: LERITA WATSON AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR AND AS et al VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motionto Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 9, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 2, Brayton Purcell¿s motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless Brayton Purcell notifies Mr. Watson of this ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, Brayton Purcell is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, Brayton Purcell is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ELVIRA B. JOHNSON, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS PERSONAL et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hartford Fire Insurance Company, West American Insurance Company, Safeco Insurance Company Of America, Travelers Indemnity Co. And Zurich American Insurance Co., Successor In Interest To Zurich Insurance Company, Us Branchs Application For An Order Granting Leave To Intervene Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 387
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 9, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 5, Hartford Fire Insurance Co., West American Insurance Co., et al.¿s application for an order granting leave to intervene pursuant to C.C.P. 387 is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 9, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 5, Hartford Fire Insurance Co., West American Insurance Co., et al.¿s motion for relief of a first paper fee being assessed against each intervenor or in the alternative that the assessed first paper fee and complex litigation fees be reduced is continued to February 20, 2013 at the moving parties¿ request. = (503/TLJ)
